features.title: AI Orchestration
features.description: A 17-Swarm Matrix of 20+ specialized AI agents coordinates every task in parallel. Each agent operates within its cognitive archetype — Owl for wisdom, Eagle for omniscience, Dolphin for creativity — ensuring the right intelligence is applied to every problem.

features.title: 51 Provisional Patents
features.description: Heady™ holds 51 filed provisional patents covering CSL (Cognitive Swarm Logic), sacred geometry AI architectures, φ-scaled parameter systems, multi-agent memory coordination, and sovereign AI identity frameworks.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Architecture
features.description: Every component ratio, memory allocation, and agent threshold is derived from the golden ratio (φ = 1.618...). This natural mathematical foundation produces systems that feel intuitive, scale gracefully, and exhibit emergent intelligence.

features.title: Multi-Cloud Infrastructure
features.description: Heady™ runs natively across Google Cloud Run, Cloudflare Workers, and edge compute nodes. Workloads are dynamically routed based on latency, cost, and compliance requirements — with zero vendor lock-in.

features.title: MCP Integration
features.description: 31 production MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools provide a standardized interface for AI-to-tool communication. Dual transport via JSON-RPC and SSE enables both synchronous and streaming integrations with Claude, OpenAI, and custom LLMs.

features.title: Self-Healing Infrastructure
features.description: Heady™ monitors its own health in real time. When agents drift, pipelines stall, or resources spike, the system automatically redistributes load, respawns failed services, and restores operational coherence — no human intervention required.

features.title: φ-Scaled Architecture
features.description: Rate limits, memory budgets, agent capacities, and queue depths are all governed by the golden ratio. This produces a system that scales with natural proportionality — never brittle under load, never wasteful at rest.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: End-to-end encryption, OAuth 2.0 with PKCE, scoped API key management, SOC 2-aligned logging, and Cloudflare's global threat intelligence protect every request. Heady™ is built for regulated industries and high-trust environments.
